title: The revolt in al-Kufah of the 'Alid al-Abbas b. Musa al-Kizim, and its suppression by Ibrahim b. al-Mahdi's forces
description: The revolt in al-Kufah of the 'Alid al-Abbas b. Musa al-Kizim, and its suppression by Ibrahim b. al-Mahdi's forces. Recorded under the year 202 AH (818 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 32
